title: Index.VerifyClaims result
description: verify-v0 P1.U4. Per-claim `results[]` (each carries `ok` plus the inner verifier's fields), and a grounding summary. DECIDABILITY RULE: indeterminate results are excluded from BOTH `grounded` and `total`. `grounding_rate` = grounded/total, and is null (not NaN) when total==0.

ok.description: true = decidable and grounded; false = decidable and failed; null = indeterminate (excluded from the rate).
